title: The Alliance Faces Kaido’s Cruel Momentum
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Five Elders, Unknown person #9, Luffy, Kaido as The rooftop battle turns desperate as Luffy falls and Zunesha links his return to Joy Boy.
scene: The rooftop battle turns desperate as Luffy falls and Zunesha links his return to Joy Boy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Taking one of us down with you was your plan from the start.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why is a surviving member of the Whitebeard Crew...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is it now?! It's just one thing after another!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Listen. This is a direct order...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are to eliminate "Straw hat" Luffy immediately!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you talking about? Straw hat is in the middle of fighting Kaido!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can't expect me to interfere in that battle!! It's impossible!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We are aware of the difficulties.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world class nature of this battle is what makes this important...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you get it...?! This order is a necessary precaution.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do they expect me to just go down empty-handed?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even we aren't privy to all the details...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What's the deal with this crew...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's nowhere left to run!! The whole castle is burning up!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
